title: Local repositories + Today loader + local date + streak compute

task.description: Implement SQLite-only repositories for categories/habits/completions plus a single Today data loader. Include local date helpers (`YYYY-MM-DD`) and pure streak computation for daily/weekly habits. All errors must surface (not swallowed).
acceptance_criteria: `insertCompletion(record)` throws an error with `name === "UniqueConstraintError"` when inserting a duplicate `(habitId,date)` and does not return a record
`setCompletion(habitId,date,completed)` creates or updates the row and sets `completedAt` to ISO string when `completed=true`, otherwise `null`
`listActiveHabits()` returns only `isArchived=0` habits ordered by `sortOrder ASC, createdAt ASC`
`toLocalDateString()` returns a string matching regex `^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$` using local device time
`computeStreakState()` is pure (no SQLite calls) and returns `currentStreak/bestStreak/lastCompletedDate` consistent with SPEC rules for daily and weekly
`loadTodayData(today)` resolves with `{habits,categories,completions}` or throws on SQLite errors (caller can show error state)

definition_of_done: All repo functions are async, SQLite-only, and throw on failure
App compiles and repos can be imported by screens
